name: Pilafi Me Garides (Rice Pilaf with Shrimp)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups tomato, peeled and strained OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the shrimp and place them in a large pot. Add enough water to cover.
2. Add salt and whole onion and celery, then bring to a boil.
3. Cook for about 5 minutes. Remove the shrimp with a slotted spoon and set aside along with the liquid.
4. Shell and devein the shrimp.
5. Heat the oil in the pot. Sauté the chopped onions until they are light golden.
6. Add the shrimp, turning occasionally. Add tomatoes (or tomato paste diluted in water). Cook for another 5 minutes, then remove the shrimp. Keep warm.
7. Measure the liquid used to cook the shrimp, allowing 2 1/2 cups for each cup of rice. Add this liquid with the tomato sauce to the pot.
8. Bring to a boil and add the rice. Stir for a few minutes to prevent sticking.
9. Cook for about 12 to 15 minutes until the rice is tender but has not absorbed all of the liquid.
10. Add 2/3 of the shrimp back into the rice, mixing well.
11. Turn off the heat. Cover with a clean towel and cover the towel with the lid.
12. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes until all liquid is absorbed.
13. Shape the rice into a pyramid and garnish with the remaining shrimp.
Serves 6-10.
